case_title: RADOCAY, EDWARD J. VS CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RADOCAY, EDWARD J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION DEFT TO PROVIDE PLFT WITH A ROUNDTRIP, COACH CLASS AIRLINE TICKET ON UNITED AIRLINES FOR TRAVEL TO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EUROPE, LATN AMERICA, HAWAII, CANADA & MEXICO AT NO COSTS TO PLFT. THE TICKET IS TO BE NON-REFUND- ABLE, NON-CANCELABLE, NON-TRANSFERABLE, & IS TO BE
ISSUED TO PLFT'S NAME & PLFT'S COMPANION. PLFT TO ADVISE DEFT OF EXACT TRAVEL ITINERARY ON OR BEFORE 4/30/99 WITH ACTUAL TRAVEL TO BE COMPLETED BY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RADOCAY, EDWARD J. AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
